'''Triewahl Docking Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]<ref name="AIR" /> located in a [[Triewahl system/Legends|star system]] situated in the [[Homon sector/Legends|Homon sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Along with its [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the station was situated on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that linked it to the [[Asamin system/Legends|Asamin system]] of the neighboring [[Strabin sector/Legends|Strabin sector]] as well as the [[Adin system/Legends|Adin system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' — Based on corresponding data for the [[Triewahl system/Legends|star system]] containing Triewahl Docking Station</ref>

At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] operatives half-[[Human/Legends|Human]]-half-[[Morellian]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Alton Lochner]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Tirranna]], along with a number of other Rebel agents, visited Triewahl Docking Station. While there, the Human [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Callandri]] and [[Zayl Braith]], members of the anti-Alliance [[Granse Confederacy]] group, attacked Lochner and Tirranna, attempting to exact revenge on the pair for repelling a previous attack on them by Callandri. Although the two Special Forces operatives were nearly [[Death/Legends|killed]], Tirranna's other companions managed to repulse the two [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Triewahl Docking Station was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the [[Star/Legends|star]] system containing the station in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA" />
